content:
My solution for mixed up unified folders is to

  1. exit thunderbird
  2. in the Mail folder within the profile, delete 'smart mailboxes'
  3. restart thunderbird
creator: davidsk

content:
david said
My solution for mixed up unified folders is to
  1. exit thunderbird
  2. in the Mail folder within the profile, delete 'smart mailboxes'
  3. restart thunderbird

I'm not sure what you mean by "in the Mail folder within the profile, delete 'smart mailboxes". Are you referring to a setting? I don't want to remove the unified folder. I just want new folders not to go there when I create them. I only want it for account inboxes.
creator: adam130

content: I was referring to a folder within the profile, accessed via Windows File manager. After deleting it and restarting, thunderbird usually starts acting properly again with unified folders.
creator: davidsk
